summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Prithvix AgriTech marketing website. All 13 requested features tested. Site is a static marketing site with no backend. All core flows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Success state div has no data-testid attribute, making it untestable via automation

issues: Animated counters (2000+, 5, 30%, 100%) start at 0 and animate on scroll-into-view using IntersectionObserver with margin:-100px. In headless environments counters appear as 0. In real browser this works correctly.

action_items: Add data-testid='demo-success' to the success state div in DemoModal.jsx (line 75) for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: DemoModal success state (line 74-89) lacks data-testid on the success message div - minor testability gap
THREE.Clock deprecation warning in console - THREE.js uses deprecated Clock, consider updating to THREE.Timer
Stats animated counters rely on IntersectionObserver with margin:-100px - works correctly in real browsers
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a static React marketing website with no backend. Use data-testid='splash-enter-btn' to enter site from splash screen. Form testids are: demo-form-name, demo-form-phone, demo-form-email, demo-form-message, demo-form-submit. Hero CTA testids: hero-demo-cta (opens modal), hero-how-it-works-cta (scrolls to section). All sections render correctly. Stats counters animate on scroll-into-view in real browser.

features_tested.splash_screen: PASS - Enter Experience button visible, click transitions to main site
features_tested.hero_section: PASS - 3D particle scene visible, headline, subtitle, Request Demo and Watch How It Works CTAs
features_tested.demo_modal: PASS - Modal opens from hero CTA and header button, all 4 form fields present, form submits showing Request Received success message for 2s then auto-closes
features_tested.watch_how_it_works: PASS - Scrolls to How It Works section (scrollY ~4621)
features_tested.features_section: PASS - 6 features with mockup visualizations visible (Farmer Registration, Credit Ledger, Inventory, Sales Analytics, AI Chat, Field Visits)
features_tested.stats_bar: PASS - Section renders with 4 stats (2000+, 5, 30%, 100%), counters animate on scroll in real browser
features_tested.how_it_works: PASS - 4 steps visible (Register Dealership, Onboard Farmers, Manage Operations, Grow Your Business)
features_tested.pricing: PASS - Basic (INR 999/mo) and Premium (INR 2,499/mo) with Recommended badge on Premium
features_tested.testimonials_carousel: PASS - Prev/next navigation buttons present, dot navigation (4 dots), carousel works
features_tested.footer: PASS - Logo, social links (Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube), 4 link columns, copyright
features_tested.navigation_header: PASS - Features, How It Works, Pricing, Testimonials links + Request a Demo button, glassmorphism sticky header
features_tested.mobile_layout: PASS - Responsive at 375px, hamburger menu works, hero adapts to mobile
features_tested.form_validation: PASS - Form requires name, phone, email (message optional)
